leadText: If you were looking for the second Galar Mine, see Galar Mine No. 2. The Galar Mine (Japanese: ガラル鉱山 Galar Mine) is a mine that connects Route 3 and Route 4.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] Galar Mine is a cave filled with minecart tracks across the cave and lit with crystals of many colors.

sections.title: Items
sections.text: Items [ edit | edit source ] Item Location Games Star Piece Next to the mine cart opposite the entrance (hidden) Sw Sh Revive At the first fork in the tunnel, next to an empty mine cart in front of a boarded-up tunnel (hidden) Sw Sh Great Ball ×3 On high ground overlooking the first put, accessed by heading south at the first fork, then doubling back into the eastern passageway Sw Sh TM26 ( Scary Face ) At the end of the west passageway of the second fork Sw Sh Stardust In the west passageway of the second fork, next to a crate against the northern wall (hidden) Sw Sh Hard Stone Against the eastern wall of the area at the south end of the bridge (hidden) Sw Sh Heavy-Duty Boots Next to the minecart full of gems at the north end of the bridge Sw Sh Ether Next to crates on the west side in the area at the north end of the bridge (hidden) Sw Sh Revive Next to a wheelbarrow in the area at the north end of the bridge (hidden) Sw Sh Super Potion ×2 East of the second cart track, just past the bend Sw Sh Stardust Next to a crate near to Route 4 exit (hidden) Sw Sh Rose 's rare League Card From Oleana at the end of the west passageway of the second fork, after becoming Champion Sw Sh
